title: Tick Control North Merrick | Tick Removal Services $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in North Merrick, Long Island. Expert tick removal and prevention for your yard. Call today for effective treatment starting at $125.
intro: North Merrick residents deserve a tick-free outdoor space to enjoy their yards safely. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from tick-borne illnesses like Lyme disease with targeted treatments designed for Long Island's unique environment. We provide comprehensive tick removal and prevention solutions throughout North Merrick neighborhoods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving North Merrick homeowners with effective, eco-conscious tick control solutions. Our licensed technicians understand Long Island's tick populations and use proven methods to eliminate ticks at every life stage, ensuring your property remains protected throughout the season.
localContext: North Merrick's tree-lined residential streets and well-maintained yards near Merrick Road and Jerusalem Avenue create ideal habitats for deer ticks and other species. Properties near Norman J. Levy Park and Preserve and the surrounding wooded areas require regular tick treatments to keep outdoor spaces safe for families and pets enjoying the neighborhood's suburban charm.

faqs.question: What does tick control service include in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Our tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted treatment of tick-prone areas like wooded edges, tall grass, and shaded zones, application of EPA-approved products, and follow-up recommendations. We focus on perimeter areas and transition zones where ticks are most likely to inhabit your North Merrick yard.

faqs.question: When is tick season in North Merrick, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Tick season in North Merrick typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active during warmer winter days, so year-round vigilance is important. We recommend starting preventive treatments in early spring before tick populations surge.

faqs.question: How often should I have tick control treatments done?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection in North Merrick, we recommend tick control treatments every 4-6 weeks during peak season. Properties near wooded areas or with heavy deer traffic may benefit from more frequent applications. Our technicians will assess your property and create a customized treatment schedule based on your specific risk factors.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. We recommend keeping kids and pets inside during application and allowing the treatment to dry completely (typically 1-2 hours) before resuming normal outdoor activities in your North Merrick yard.
